    @allure.story("上麦验证取消")
    @allure.title("【场景】TC-MIC-001~004 大神上麦→验证排麦→取消排麦→验证取消")
    @pytest.mark.P1
    def test_mic_operation_flow(
        self, community_api, dashen_user_id, party_channel_fixture
    ):
        """上麦 → 验证排麦列表 → 取消排麦 → 验证取消"""
        data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
        community = data["community"]
        party_data = data["party"]
    
        channel_id = party_channel_fixture["channel_id"]
        server_id = party_channel_fixture["server_id"]
    
        # Step 1: 大神申请上麦
        with allure.step("大神申请上麦"):
            resp = community_api.race_person_channel_mic(
                up_down=party_data["up_down"],
                mic_no=party_data["mic_no"],
                user_id=dashen_user_id,
                channel_id=channel_id,
                server_id=server_id,
                up_mic_mode=party_data["up_mic_mode"],
            )
            result = assert_response_success(resp)
>           _assert_ret_code_100(result, "大神申请上麦")
